properties.Name: Kitchener Ward 9 / Waterloo Ward 7
properties.information-link:
Properties in this area may be eligible to vote in Kitchener Ward 9 and/or Waterloo Ward 7. Contact the Kitchener and Waterloo clerk offices to confirm which ward applies to your address.
